series_metadata.series_description: Examination files include statutory examination report, financial statements, paid invoices, annual CU-2 report, and any correspondence relating to a particular credit union.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for twenty (20) years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for twenty (20) years following the date of examination, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
